name: The Credit Clinic
description_short: The Credit Clinic is a credit repair provider based in Tempe, Arizona. Rated 4.9/5 with 75 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
The Credit Clinic is a credit repair provider serving clients in Tempe, Arizona. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 75 reviews, The Credit Clinic has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Tempe area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

The Credit Clinic specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Tempe, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. The Credit Clinic operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Tempe, Arizona area who are considering The Credit Clinic should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
